criteria.reason: Blueprint send now requires drafts approval, and targeted test proves unrelated approval does not unlock send.
Dangerous capability fallback policy requires human review and is covered by tests plus live policy check.
Dispatcher default is disabled in worker code and compose; production worker env is false.
Blueprint still queues through ActionOrchestrator and production dispatcher remains disabled with no dispatch logs.
New static audit, targeted tests, local py_compile, and backend lint baseline passed.
Production scripts/tests sync completed, server audit passed, app/worker health is green, root HTTP 200, and worker env false was verified.
scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py and pytest now guard direct Blueprint/Operator dispatch/provider-send bypasses plus billing/manual-publication markers.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_approval_boundaries_audit.py tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py tests/test_operator_paid_action_adapter.py tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_manual_publish.py

git archive --format=tar HEAD scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py scripts/lint_backend_baseline.sh tests/test_approval_boundaries_audit.py | ssh ... 'cd /opt/seo-app && tar -xf - && python3 scripts/audit_approval_boundaries.py && docker compose ps && curl -I http://localhost:8000 && docker compose exec -T worker sh -lc "printenv OUTREACH_DISPATCH_ENABLED || true"'
